final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of a Japanese school campus during cherry blossom season with a sailor-uniformed girl in front of the school building.

Style/medium: Japanese youth photography, fresh and airy aesthetic inspired by Japanese school dramas and spring editorials
Composition: medium shot at eye level, 50mm lens, subject positioned slightly off-center with school building as backdrop, gentle depth of field
Subject: teenage girl in traditional Japanese sailor uniform (seifuku), hair gently blown by breeze, relaxed posture facing camera with soft smile
Scene/backdrop: Japanese school campus with traditional school building facade, cherry blossom trees in full bloom, petals falling through the air, clear spring day
Lighting/mood: bright natural sunlight from high angle, soft diffused quality, warm and uplifting atmosphere conveying youth and freshness
Color palette: soft pink cherry blossoms as dominant accent, warm skin tones, muted blue-grey school building, fresh green foliage, bright sky blue
Materials/textures: delicate cherry blossom petals with translucent quality, crisp cotton uniform fabric, natural hair strands catching light
Avoid: over-saturated colors, plastic skin texture, cluttered composition, artificial poses, watermark, 8K stuffer terms
